description: Brain Research — pluggable backend (local SQLite or MCP Memory Server) + embedding provider.

ingestion._comment_ingestion: Quando true E backend.type=mcp-memory, o hook Stop envia a conversa do turno ao memory server (add_document, type=conversation) para curadoria/dreaming server-side. Ative por-usuário no dashboard (grava em DATA_DIR/brain/user-config.json, nunca aqui). Default false: enviar o chat é opt-in explícito (privacidade).

retrieval._comment_contextExcludeTypes: Tipos (lesson/pattern/reference/memory) que NÃO entram no bloco [BRAIN] injetado no UserPromptSubmit; default [] = injeta todos (comportamento atual). Ative por usuário via DATA_DIR/brain/user-config.json (não aqui, pra não afetar terceiros).

capture._comment_capture: Phase 1.5 lesson-capture guard (scripts/capture-dispatch.js). maxBlockAttempts is a SAFETY cap: after this many consecutive Stops where the agent never acked the open capture offer (via capture_lesson/capture_ack), the Stop hook RELENTS and lets the turn end — preventing a hard deadlock when the brain-server/MCP is down (acking is literally impossible) or the model is stuck. Generous on purpose (capture matters, so it re-asks several times first). It does NOT weaken block-until-ack in the normal case, and the un-captured cycle is NEVER dropped — it stays queued for a future session. Override per-user in DATA_DIR/brain/user-config.json under kb.capture, not here (the shipped file is replaced on plugin update).
